name: plan051-fos-career-source-diagnostics-dashboard
description: Add a read-only fos-career dashboard view that summarizes latest position source diagnostics and imported row counts.
recommended_defaults: Use imported MySQL rows and latest source_diagnostics text as the display source.
Do not run collectors or write career-os files from the dashboard.
Treat write actions as a separate safety design because the deployment mount is read-only.
